title: RUSTINS MDF Primer, Grey, 250 ml (Pack of 1)
features: Quick-Drying and Efficient – Rustins MDF Grey Primer offers a fast-drying formula that helps speed up your painting projects while delivering professional-grade surface preparation for MDF and wood
Exceptional Surface Sealing – This grey primer effectively seals porous MDF surfaces, preventing paint absorption and ensuring even topcoat coverage with fewer coats and less effort

Smooth Finish for Enhanced Results – Engineered to provide a smooth and consistent base, this primer enhances the final look of your paint job by eliminating patchiness and uneven absorption; ADD TO BASKET now
Versatile Interior Use – Specifically formulated for interior MDF and bare wood applications, it works beautifully on furniture, shelves, crafts, and panelling to achieve a long-lasting finish

Good Coverage and Easy Application – This water-based MDF primer offers excellent coverage with minimal odour; it can be applied with brush or roller, making it suitable for professionals and DIYers alike
description: From the manufacturer About Us Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with 50 pounds. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the good brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins MDGP250 Quick Drying MDF Grey Primer 250ml Rustins Quick Drying MDF Primer is a water based primer for use on indoor and outdoor work. Used as a primer, it is suitable for new and bare MDF. It has good opacity and can be used as an undercoat on primed or painted surfaces. This primer may be over coated with water or solvent based finishing paints.
